audit_items.proof_trace: The 3-level ACL is correctly enforced: workflowId is checked explicitly at line 99; the selector check at line 110 (`allowlistedSelectors[target].contains(selector)`) acts as a composite gate because the data invariant guarantees `allowlistedSelectors[target]` is non-empty only if target is in `allowlistedTargets` — enforced by `_applyAllowlistedSelectorsUpdates` (line 260) requiring target presence before adding selectors, and `_applyAllowlistedTargetsUpdates` (line 205) purging all selectors before target removal. bytes4↔bytes32 representations are consistent (right-padded) on both write and read paths.
